company_name: Resonac Holdings Corporation (formerly Showa Denko K.K.)
abf_relation: Key semiconductor materials supplier. Formed from Showa Denko + Hitachi Chemical merger (2023). Inherited ABF substrate material capabilities from Hitachi Chemical.

review.reason: Strong semiconductor materials player with verified financial data from company website. Consolidated revenue ~$9B. ABF relevance confirmed through Hitachi Chemical heritage. Data quality good (T2 source).

data_sources: Training knowledge on Showa Denko / Hitachi Chemical
review_notes: Resonac is the parent company formed from Showa Denko + Hitachi Chemical merger. Hitachi Chemical was already reviewed in earlier run (score 62). Resonac provides consolidated view. Strong import candidate for semiconductor materials tracking.
